name: python3-docket
title: python3-docket
description:
distributed background task system (Python 3)
This package contains a distributed background task system for Python
functions with a focus on the scheduling of future work as seamlessly and
efficiently as immediate work.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use docket because distributed background task system (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use docket as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `docket [options] [args]` as documented upstream for docket.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair docket with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `docket --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
